title: UPS India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: UPS India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
